tasks.description: Create Saleor data service with product/category queries
tasks.acceptance: Service fetches real data from Saleor with fallback to mock

tasks.description: Add Saleor GraphQL queries for products and categories
Update resolvers to use Saleor data service
tasks.acceptance: Resolvers return Saleor data when configured
All existing tests pass with Saleor integration

phases.name: Automated Saleor Integration Test with Debug Mode

tasks.description: Add debug mode support via DEBUG_MODE environment variable to test runner
tasks.acceptance: Tests check DEBUG_MODE env var to enable debug mode

tasks.description: Implement Saleor request/response logging to console in debug mode
tasks.acceptance: Debug mode outputs request/response data to console (captured by test runner)

tasks.description: Create end-to-end integration test: select first restaurant, order one of each item, include comment test order
tasks.acceptance: Integration test passes: selects restaurant, adds all items, places order with test comment
